description: After a successful closing, the TC must create a final package of all transaction documents for the client.

nodes.task_description: Gather all signed contracts, addenda, disclosures, and the final closing statement from the transaction file.

expected_outcome.value: Agent compiles a complete set of all executed documents from the transaction.

nodes.task_description: Combine all documents into a single, organized PDF file.

expected_outcome.value: A single, bookmarked PDF containing all documents is created.

nodes.task_description: Send the final document package to the client for their records via a secure link.

expected_outcome.value: A secure email with a link to download the final documents is sent to the client.
